description: Measure the average lamellar spacing of the eutectic microstructure in 'AuPbSn40.tif' using a spatial calibration of 0.49 µm/pixel. Isolate the lamellar structure using a bandpass filter (filtering structures larger than 40 pixels and smaller than 3 pixels) and perform an FFT analysis to determine the average peak-to-peak spacing in microns. Save the FFT Power Spectrum to ~/Fiji_Data/results/fft_analysis/fft_power_spectrum.png, the bandpass filtered image to ~/Fiji_Data/results/fft_analysis/bandpass_filtered.png, the line profile data to ~/Fiji_Data/results/fft_analysis/line_profile.csv, and a text report containing the phrase 'lamellar spacing' and the measured value in µm to ~/Fiji_Data/results/fft_analysis/spacing_report.txt.
